top_signals.title: Houthis say they attacked tankers in Red Sea, widening war
top_signals.summary: The Red Sea has emerged as a vital workaround for oil exports, particularly from Saudi Arabia, amid disruptions to shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Who is Mykhailo Drapatyi? ‘The Flying BMP’ who now leads Ukraine’s military
top_signals.summary: Zelenskyy names reform-minded Drapatyi as new commander-in-chief, replacing Syrsyki to bend to the largest protests of the war over the firing of Fedorov.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
